steps.t: Duskleaf can be found somewhere near the Enting Hollow in north-eastern Balewood. Nindorn has sent you in search of his lost friend, Duskleaf, and hop…
Duskleaf can be found at the Enting Hollow. Duskleaf has appeared from the shadows, and you should now speak with him and try to convince him to rejoi…
Nindorn can be found in northern Balewood. You have defeated the maddened Duskleaf. You should bring these ill tidings to Nindorn.
